title: Shops at Wiregrass
summary: The Shops at Wiregrass is a regional outdoor shopping mall located off of interstate 75 in Wesley Chapel, Florida. The mall is owned by TriGate Capital.
text:
The Shops at Wiregrass is a regional outdoor shopping mall located off of interstate 75 in Wesley Chapel, Florida. The mall is owned by TriGate Capital.

Amenities
The mall features 97 stores and restaurants. The anchors of the mall are Macy's, JCPenney, and Dillard's and the two mini-anchors are Barnes & Noble and Pottery Barn.

History
The Shops at Wiregrass opened on October 30, 2008. The grand opening for the mall was a 2-day event that hosted several activities. The mall was originally owned by Forest City Development.
In 2017, the mall was sold to Queensland Investment Corporation in a bundle of 10 retail malls for $3.2 billion. The amount paid for the Shops at Wiregrass is unknown.
In 2023, Trigate Capital bought the Shops at Wiregrass for $70.5 million.
